hero.headline: Security, engineered into the fabric of the building.
hero.sub: AIT designs, installs, and integrates security and low-current systems across the Middle East — from villa compounds to Expo City. One accountable team, from cable tray to control room.
hero.imageAlt: Sheikh Zayed Road towers at dusk, Dubai

about.pullNote: Our vision, in our own words
about.body1: AIT is a security systems integrator based in Dubai, working across the Middle East and North Africa. We are much more than a product distributor: a state-of-the-art integrator committed to cost-effective yet leading-edge security and low-current solutions.
about.body2: Traditional security is no longer enough. Keys and cards can be lent, lost, copied, or stolen; PIN codes can be observed or forgotten — and a breach may go unnoticed for days. We build integrated systems where access, surveillance, fire, and building management speak to each other.
about.imageAlt: Aerial view of Burj Al Arab and the Dubai coastline

items.name: Fairness & honesty
items.text: Straight answers on scope, cost, and schedule — before and after the contract is signed.

items.name: Quality & integrity
items.text: BICSI, ANSI, and EIA/TIA standards behind every cable pulled and every reader mounted.

items.name: Continuous improvement
items.text: More than twelve years of security systems experience, and a methodology that gets sharper with each project.

services.title: Four service lines. One accountable partner.
services.intro: In-house design, coordination, procurement, and installation — bundled so that responsibility never falls between contractors.

items.name: Security & Low-Current Integration
items.summary: Full turnkey electronic security and structured infrastructure for buildings of every scale.

items.name: Datacenter Business Solutions
items.summary: Server, storage, virtualization, and continuity — tailored to the business need.
items.imageAlt: Server racks with patch cabling in a datacenter

items.name: Network & Security Solutions
items.summary: Turnkey network design and hardening by engineers who have designed, deployed, and operated networks across the region.
items.imageAlt: Network patch panel with labelled cables

items.name: Tailored Application Solutions
items.summary: A dedicated software team building applications shaped to your budget and needs.
items.imageAlt: Close-up of a red printed circuit board

projects.title: Proof, delivered.
projects.intro: A reference list built project by project across the UAE — towers, hotels, campuses, parks, and one 40-metre-deep pool.

featured.name: Expo City Dubai
featured.text: Fiber connectivity, structured cabling for 45 police offices, and IoT sensor networks across the Expo City site.

featured.name: Mitsubishi Corporation — Middle East HQ
featured.place: Dubai · Abu Dhabi · Qatar · Saudi Arabia
featured.text: Approved Middle East security provider: fully centralized CCTV and access control across all regional facilities.

featured.name: Pearl Diving Pool
featured.text: Full access control for a 40-metre-deep indoor diving facility: 40+ fingerprint readers on redundant controllers, integrated with fire alarm, CCTV, BMS, and gate barriers.

featured.name: Shada Hotel, Jumeirah
featured.text: Complete hospitality technology stack: guest room management, IPTV, IP telephony, back-of-house access, and occupancy systems.

featured.name: Nasma Central Park
featured.text: Outdoor CCTV for the full park: industrial poles, switches, and fiber/Cat6A backbones to the main control room.
